infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to upload vendor logos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library to upload vendor logos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to find service providers near you.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow EasyFinder to access your photos for uploading vendor logos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow EasyFinder to use location to find service providers near you.
